utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage (with physical and mental health insurance and costs, plus total health cost), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs, plus total), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs, plus total), additional_services (enhancement services with costs, plus total), and total_budget (monthly/annual breakdown and more). Each required item is present and specifies the coverage type and associated costs. Thus, all items are included and fully specified per the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth. For health physical: 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' exists with rating 10. For mental health: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' exists with rating 8. For home insurance: 'VitalPlus Standard Coverage' exists with rating 6. For property add-on: 'Smart Home Integration Add-on' corresponds to 'Smart Home Integration' in property_enhancement_services with rating 8. For travel base: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel_insurance has rating 7. For business travel add-on: 'Business Travel Support Add-on' corresponds to 'Business Travel Support' in travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. Concierge services are eliminated; no rating mapping needed.
